response:
CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: BornIn(michael, yorkshire)  
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: exists x.(SonOf(michael, x))  
CANDIDATE_OVERSTRONG: (BornIn(michael, yorkshire) & exists x.(SonOf(michael, x) & GeneralPractitioner(x) & BornIn(x, yorkshire)))  
CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: exists x.(GeneralPractitioner(michael) & SonOf(x, yorkshire))
